scripts.build: pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/shared build && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/api build && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/shared test && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/api test && pnpm --filter @japan-travel-planner/web test
